mapper.select: SELECT popup_zone_oid , popup_zone_nm , smry , popup_zone_link , thmb_path , inq_cnt , open_yn , use_yn , reg_id , reg_dt , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.popup_zone WHERE popup_zone_oid = #{popupZoneOid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.popup_zone
popup_zone_nm = #{popupZoneNm},
smry = #{smry},
popup_zone_link = #{popupZoneLink},
thmb_path = #{thmbPath},
open_yn = #{openYn},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId},
mdfcn_dt = NOW(), use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE popup_zone_oid = #{popupZoneOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.popup_zone SET use_yn = 'N' , mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId} , mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE popup_zone_oid IN
#{popupZoneOid}
